data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of group coordination for split payments, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the functionality of split payments. While there are multiple bookings and payment attempts, there is no direct evidence that demonstrates how the system handles split payments among multiple users. This indicates a gap in the validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of split payment functionality being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
